evals.prompt: Create a monthly sales report in Word with executive summary, one regional table, and conclusions. Save to an allowed absolute path.
evals.expected_output: Report created with complete structure, included table, no unresolved placeholders, and explicit allowed-path confirmation.

evals.prompt: Generate a formal client letter with subject line, 3 body paragraphs, and signature. Include basic metadata.
evals.expected_output: Formal letter with full structure and metadata, saved as .docx.

evals.prompt: Create meeting minutes with participants, 3 agenda topics, and an action items table with owners and due dates.
evals.expected_output: Minutes document with expected sections and complete follow-up table.

evals.prompt: Generate a proposal with executive summary, scope, pricing options, and timeline table.
evals.expected_output: Proposal with coherent section flow and at least two tables (pricing and timeline).

evals.prompt: Generate a university report with institutional cover, objectives, development, conclusions, and bibliography.
evals.expected_output: Academic report with complete university-style structure and consistent formatting.

evals.prompt: Draft a formal request to an academic director for deadline extension with rationale and attachments.
evals.expected_output: Formal request with clear administrative structure and explicit attachment list.

evals.prompt: Create a 16-week syllabus with units, grading policy, and weekly schedule table.
evals.expected_output: Syllabus with course metadata, weighted assessment, and weekly schedule.

evals.prompt: Take an existing Word document, improve structure using headings, normalize formatting, and export to PDF only if requested.
evals.expected_output: Restructured document with clear headings and normalized style; PDF export only when explicitly requested.

evals.prompt: If the user provides a path outside allowed directories, stop execution and request a valid absolute path.
evals.expected_output: No out-of-scope file is created; clear path-validation error is returned.
